name: agent-memory
description: Persistent, searchable agent memory with global and project scopes for Codex and other MCP-capable agents.

interface.shortDescription: Global and project memory with lite and deep layers
interface.longDescription: Adds persistent agent memory with separate global and project scopes to Codex through one bundled MCP server and a memory skill. The MCP server can initialize repo-local storage on demand, keeps global preferences under ~/.agents/agent-memory, and provides tools for reading, writing, searching, and managing reusable knowledge in both scopes.
defaultPrompt: Read my global memory and apply my preferences
Enable project memory in this repo
Save this deployment runbook to memory
